nasb.text: Then they went in to offer sacrifices and burnt offerings. Now Jehu had stationed for himself eighty men outside, and he had said, “The one who permits any of the men whom I bring into your hands to escape shall give up his life in exchange.”

esv.text: Then they went in to offer sacrifices and burnt offerings. Now Jehu had stationed eighty men outside and said, “The man who allows any of those whom I give into your hands to escape shall forfeit his life.”

cnv.text: 他們進去獻祭和獻燔祭。耶戶布置了八十個人在外面，說：“如果我帶來交在你們手中的人，有一個從他們中間逃脫了，你們就要以命抵命。”

ccb.text: 耶户和约拿达在庙里献上祭物和燔祭。此前，他预先派了八十人在庙外守着，并下令：“我把这些人交在你们手中，谁放走一个，谁就要以命抵偿。”
